location: 1000 E Beltline Ave NE, Grand Rapids, MI
crs: EPSG:26916 (m), vertical NAVD88 m -> reported ft

dem.value: USGS one meter x61y476 MI 31Co Kent 2016 (1.0 m)

capacity.source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Frederik_Meijer_Gardens (tiered lawn seating for 1,900; flagged citation-needed there, but the 1,900 figure is used venue-wide in press)

audience_facing_az_deg.note: from OSM stage rectangle orientation + seating side; consistent w/ DEM fall line

stage_frontage_ft.note: inferred: lens-canopy chord facing audience from OSM footprint (long dim 110 ft); deck edge slightly inside canopy

stage_depth_ft.note: inferred: OSM canopy short dim 54 ft; deck inset

stage_front_to_row1_ft.note: digitized 2026-06-12 from DEM centerline profile fine structure; row1 = first terrace seat-wall, top = lawn crest before promenade

fan_angle_deg.note: angular extent (2-98 pct) of mid-bowl contour about stage-front anchor (anchor center inferred); imagery read was 100 deg

inner_radius_ft.note: row-1 distance from stage-front arc center; contour check r(row1+2ft) = 31.2 ft

outer_radius_ft.note: top-of-seating distance on centerline; contour check r(top-2ft) = 96.1 ft

upper_row_distance_ft.note: stage front -> top seating row, on axis

row1_arc_length_ft.note: measured fan x row-1 radius (anchor center inferred)

row_count_est.note: inferred: hillshade/imagery arc count ring 8-38 m; 1 m DEM cannot resolve individual seat walls

ada.value: level entry plaza at stage sides; flanking paths both sides of lawn; cross path mid-bowl ~ring 35 m (imagery)

backdrop.value: audience faces ~NNE across stage to pond + sculpture-park woodland; low covered stage, open landscape backdrop
